$comment: Per-repo commit-gate rules for chonkers. Aligned with the current architecture: src/{persistence,engine,ai,sim,audio,design,scene,utils} as pure-TS packages. There is no app/, no React, no SQLite. Tests co-located in __tests__/ within each package. See docs/ARCHITECTURE.md for the full picture. Many rules below are PREVENTIVE — they fire only when a future commit introduces a violation.

coverage_rules.block_message: src/engine/ change without a co-located __tests__ update. The engine is the spine — every behavior change must land with the property test that proves it.
src/ai/ change without a co-located __tests__ update.
src/persistence/ change without a co-located __tests__ update.
src/sim/ change without a co-located __tests__ update. The sim broker is the integration point — changes must land with the matching test.
src/scene/ change requires browser-tier test pass evidence.

coverage_rules.or_explicit_skip: // rules-doc-only: <≥10 word reason explaining why no test follows>
coverage_rules.block_message: RULES.md is authoritative. A rule change must land with the engine test that proves it.
AI.md is authoritative. A contract change must land with the test that proves it.
app/ change without a co-located __tests__ or an e2e spec update. Solid overlays must land with the click-the-button-fires-the-action test.
UI_FLOWS.md is authoritative. A flow change must land with either the e2e spec or the Solid component that implements it.
Capacitor / Android / iOS change requires `pnpm cap:sync` evidence.

ban_patterns.message: chonkers AI is fully deterministic. The 'two identical games' fear is a flawed-algorithm symptom, not a determinism problem. No PRNG anywhere in game logic.
Engine + AI must be wall-clock independent. Animation timing belongs in src/scene/ via gsap.
There is no React in the project. The render layer is vanilla three.js + gsap + DOM SVG; the overlay layer is Solid.
There is no ReactDOM in the project.
R3F was retired in PRQ-T0. Use vanilla three.js.
Radix was retired in PRQ-T0. Diegetic SVG overlays only — see docs/DESIGN.md.
framer-motion was retired in PRQ-T0. Use gsap factories in src/scene/animations.ts.
SQLite + drizzle were retired in PRQ-T-persist. Persistence is KV-only via @capacitor/preferences — see docs/PERSISTENCE.md.
src/engine/ is a leaf package. It must not import from any other src/ package. See docs/ARCHITECTURE.md module-boundary rules.
src/ai/ may only import from src/engine/ (one-way). See docs/ARCHITECTURE.md module-boundary rules.
Yuka's MathUtils / NavMesh / WanderBehavior / steering call Math.random(). Use only Yuka's deterministic primitives (Graph, Node, Edge, Vector3, BoundingSphere, BVH, Dijkstra, AStar).
Solid is the menu-overlay universe — its imports are confined to app/. The src/ tree is the canvas universe (three.js + gsap). See CLAUDE.md 'Strict architectural rules'.
three.js + gsap are the canvas universe — their imports are confined to src/scene/. The app/ tree is the Solid menu-overlay universe. See CLAUDE.md 'Strict architectural rules'.
app/ must not import scene internals. The bridge is the koota world + the broker actions namespace.
